## 🎨 Palette UX Review

### 💡 What & Why
*Describe the change and its impact on the user experience.*

### ✅ Checklist
- [ ] **Accessibility:** Used semantic HTML, added ARIA labels to icon-only buttons, and ensured keyboard navigation support.
- [ ] **Interaction:** Added loading states, feedback for actions, and ensured consistent behavior.
- [ ] **Verification:** Ran `pnpm lint` and `pnpm test` (if applicable) and manually verified the UI on different screen sizes.
